name: player_team cpoe from plays range year_offset pools numerator/denominator
description: Player variant AVG carve-out: CPOE re-expressed as SUM(cpoe)/SUM(non-null dropbacks) only in the range path so the window pools the dropbacks rather than averaging per-season means. Raw scale (no x100), matching the AVG(cpoe) season render.
expected_query: with "tca1b32adc1d89eca0cb139b7ad211bb5" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."off" as "nfl_team", SUM(cpoe) as team_completion_percentage_over_expected_from_plays_numerator, SUM(CASE WHEN cpoe IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as team_completion_percentage_over_expected_from_plays_denominator, "nfl_plays"."year", "nfl_plays"."week" from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2024, 2025) group by "nfl_plays"."off", "nfl_plays"."year", "nfl_plays"."week"), "tca1b32adc1d89eca0cb139b7ad211bb5_player_team_stats" as materialized (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", sum(tca1b32adc1d89eca0cb139b7ad211bb5.team_completion_percentage_over_expected_from_plays_numerator) as team_completion_percentage_over_expected_from_plays_numerator, sum(tca1b32adc1d89eca0cb139b7ad211bb5.team_completion_percentage_over_expected_from_plays_denominator) as team_completion_percentage_over_expected_from_plays_denominator from "player_gamelogs" inner join "nfl_games" on "player_gamelogs"."esbid" = "nfl_games"."esbid" inner join "tca1b32adc1d89eca0cb139b7ad211bb5" on "player_gamelogs"."nfl_team" = "tca1b32adc1d89eca0cb139b7ad211bb5"."nfl_team" and "nfl_games"."year" = "tca1b32adc1d89eca0cb139b7ad211bb5"."year" and "nfl_games"."week" = "tca1b32adc1d89eca0cb139b7ad211bb5"."week" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2024, 2025) and "player_gamelogs"."season_year" in (2024, 2025) group by "player_gamelogs"."pid") select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, (SELECT SUM(tca1b32adc1d89eca0cb139b7ad211bb5_player_team_stats.team_completion_percentage_over_expected_from_plays_numerator) / NULLIF(SUM(tca1b32adc1d89eca0cb139b7ad211bb5_player_team_stats.team_completion_percentage_over_expected_from_plays_denominator), 0) FROM tca1b32adc1d89eca0cb139b7ad211bb5_player_team_stats WHERE tca1b32adc1d89eca0cb139b7ad211bb5_player_team_stats.pid = player.pid) AS "team_completion_percentage_over_expected_from_plays_0", "player"."primary_position" from "player" group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
